name: 18.25"x17.75" 24.25" Charlotte Print Adirondack Outdoor 1pc Chair Cushion - Room Essentials™
description:
Make your seating space fresh and fabulous with this 1-Piece Charlotte Print Adirondack Outdoor Chair Cushion from Room Essentials™. Made of 100% recycled polyester with foam filling for plush comfort, this Adirondack chair cushion features a multicolor plaid print for a refreshing vibe . The knife-edge finish with round corners give it a polished look, while the sewn-seam closure and side ties keep the cushion securely in place. Build to handle outdoor conditions, this cushion is water repellent and resistant to weather and UV rays — making it perfect for patios, decks and garden spaces.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
